text: Dad did you already go to the store? We're out of milk and Isabella wants cereal tomorrow
Not yet. Going after my shift. Anything else?
Orange juice and those frozen burritos Miguel likes. Thanks
Dad can you pick me up from Crestview at 4? Practice ran late
I'm on 14 right now. Be there by 4:15 latest. Wait inside
ok
Chris they changed the floor 16 schedule again. You're now on 12-14 Tuesday and I got 15-18. Does that work for you?
Yeah that's fine. 18 is a pain anyway. I'll let Gerald know if he asks
He already approved it. You're good. See you at 7
Hey Chris. Got the edited proofs from the Fuentes Quince consultation back. Sending you a Drive link. Let me know which shots Camila's mom should see first
Send me the link. She's going to want the altar setup and the court of honor poses. Skip the candids for now, she's picky
Got it. Sending now. Also — are we confirmed for the Emerald Hall walkthrough October 3?
Yes. Oct 3 10am Emerald Hall. Put it in your calendar now, I'm not chasing people down the week before
Hi this is Chris Murray from Momentos by Chris. Following up on the DJ quote for November 14 at Las Palmas. We need 5 hours, bilingual MC, and a full light rig. Still waiting on your revised pricing
Hey Chris sorry for the delay. Revised quote is $1,850 all in. That covers setup, breakdown, MC, and the rig. Deposit to hold the date is $400
I'll run it by the family this weekend. If they say yes I'll Venmo the deposit Monday. Don't book that date yet
Mijo how are you? Are the kids eating ok? Isabella sent me a picture of her hair for the recital she looks so beautiful
We're good Mom. Kids are fine. Isabella's excited about December. You still coming for Christmas?
Of course! Carlos and I are already looking at flights. I want to make tamales this year, are you going to help me?
Yes. I'll handle the masa. You're in charge of the filling. Same as always
Chris — the Rodriguez vals choreography is set. 14 chambelanes confirmed. I need to know if the rehearsal at Emerald Hall is happening Oct 3 or a separate date
Oct 3 is a venue walkthrough only, no dancers. Rehearsal will be a separate day, probably 2 weeks before Oct 17. I'll confirm by end of next week
Dad can I borrow the Odyssey Saturday morning? Just need it till noon
Where are you going
Just Marcus's house for a pickup basketball thing. Not far
Fine. Full tank when you get back
Buenos días mijo, did you eat breakfast before the shift?
Sí Mom, coffee and eggs. Heading in now.
The card you sent came, it's beautiful. Gracias.
Glad it made it. Sending the support this morning.
Carlos says the pharmacy has my refill ready.
Good, tell him thank you for picking it up.
How are the kids? Is Isabella still dancing?
Recital is December 11, I'll video call you.
Don't work so much, you hear me?
I hear you Mom. Talk Sunday at noon.
Did you find a photo for the altar this year?
Found the one of you and Dad from '79.
Feliz cumpleaños early, I made your favorite growing up.
Pot roast? You always remember.
Hermano, Mom's blood pressure meds are refilled.
Thanks for staying on top of it. Support sent.
You still good to split the holiday drive?
Yeah, I'll take the first leg down.
Valentina made honor roll, wanted you to know.
That's my girl. Tell her tío is proud.
How's the event season treating you?
Two Quinces back to back, but it's good money.
Daniela says come for Christmas if you can.
Trying to. Depends on the cookie orders.
Call Mom, she worries when you're quiet.
Calling her Sunday, same as always.
You seeing this game right now?? 😩
Defense is asleep. Told you.
Gerald put me on 15 and 16 like you asked.
Good. Keep an eye on the new kid on turndown.
Break room coffee is gone again. Tragic.
I'll bring the good stuff tomorrow.
You okay? You looked wiped after the double.
Back's talking to me but I'm fine.
Inspection prep list looks solid btw.
Thanks. Just need the cart wheels in.
Don't forget you promised tamales.
December. I never forget tamales.
Confirmed for Rodriguez Oct 17, 8-hour package.
Perfect. Ceremony's 5 PM sharp, waltz first.
Sending you the shot list tonight.
Table candids during dinner, don't miss the toast.
Gallery from the Castillo event is uploaded.
Client's going to love those. Sending your invoice through.
Want me at the Oct 3 walkthrough?
Your call. Lighting positions would help.
Rehearsal for Mariana's court is set for the 10th.
Good. Five couples, the waltz plus surprise dance.
The kids are nervous but they'll be ready.
You're great with them, that's why I book you.
Need the song list for the choreography.
Sending it tonight, client picked the vals.
Dad I can help with Fuentes setup if I'm not on nights.
Send me your clinical dates and I'll plan around it.
Bought the centerpiece vases you wanted.
Perfect, mija. Put the receipt on the event pile.
You're doing too much again.
I've got it handled. Focus on your rotations.
Team, room assignments for tomorrow are posted.
Copy, I've got 17 and 18.
Two VIP checkouts on 12, extra amenities needed.
On it, restocking the cart now.
New hire cleared bathroom standards today. 👏
Nice work everyone. Inspection's close, stay sharp.
Sunday dinner at 1, everyone home please.
I'll be there, off work by 3.
Can we do carne asada this week?
Already planned. Bring appetites.
Abuela says hi from Jacksonville. ❤️
Tell her we love her, calling at noon.
Buenos días mijo, did you eat breakfast before the shift? (checking in 1/21)
